message:
chore(beads): file 4 conformance-harness review beads (review cycle 3)

Applied /testing-conformance-harnesses skill to fnp-conformance + fnp-python.
Workspace state at review: 3721 passed / 0 failed / 1 ignored test battery,
0 clippy errors under -D warnings. 14 domains, 45 fixture JSON files,
DISCREPANCIES.md present with DISC-001/DISC-002 documented.

Findings (all MEDIUM/LOW — no CRITICAL/HIGH regressions):

- pqam [MEDIUM]: fixtures/PROVENANCE.md missing; 39 of 45 fixtures
  undocumented. Skill says provenance is "non-negotiable".
- gghj [MEDIUM]: no single-command fixture regeneration workflow;
  numpy-version bumps require manual orchestration across 14 domains.
- vobv [LOW]: COVERAGE.md hand-maintained; skill's Pattern 1 emits
  auto-generated compliance matrix from test-run JSON output.
- owxp [LOW]: fnp-python's 374 parity tests not tagged with
  MUST/SHOULD/MAY RequirementLevel metadata; Pattern 4 would formalise.

No CRITICAL / HIGH findings — the conformance crate is mature and
well-maintained. All gaps are workflow/reporting improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
